title: Threat intelligence output
description: Normalized actor profiles, clustered incident claims, activity, targeting, TTP, source, and dataset coverage rows. The OUTPUT key-value record also exposes monetization readiness, 100-row conversion progress, the real-row marketplace conversion sample pack, a blocked first-100 buyer preview, and the paid-release buyer verdict.
